steps: Make sure you have autoclaved glycerol, cryovials and a fresh bacterial culture in liquid b-broth or LB. If you don't have a fresh bacterial culture, you can grow them in b-broth or LB medium at 180 rpm in flasks.
Prepare a sterile 50% glycerol/50% DEPC water solution.
Add 1 ml 50/50 solution to as many cryovials as you want, e.g. 6
Add 1 ml of bacterial culture to the cryovials, close them with the cap and shake them.
Store the cryovials in the -80 ° freezer.
creator: Cristian Riccio
